releases.name: TSA V2.5.4
releases.notes:
Hi Team,

The latest TSA Version 2.2.4 has been deployed and is now available for use.

The following enhancements and fixes have been completed based on the feedback and requirements shared by the team:

 

Completed Items

System Login functionality implemented.
Improved document selection mechanism to ensure the required documents are selected more accurately.
Added Individual Tender Data Upload functionality to support tender-specific corrigendum handling.
Implemented default "Yes" selection for all compliance parameters.
Added Signature File Upload functionality.
Added display of critical tender information in the Eligibility section.
Added Checklist Excel Download functionality containing:
Documents
Fillable Forms
Compliance Data
Removed CIMCON letterhead from specific generated documents as requested.
Implemented API Credit Validation and Notification mechanism:
Prevents incomplete or partially processed analysis due to insufficient API balance.
Addressed various minor issues and usability improvements reported by the team.
Work in progress

• Final Bid Grouping based on TD Details is currently under development and will be discussed further tomorrow.

Action Required

• As discussed in the previous meeting, the Tender Proposal Team was expected to provide the updated document naming list to improve document matching accuracy.

Kindly share the updated document list so that we can proceed with further optimization of the document mapping process.

Note

• The latest version is now available and stable for usage.

• You may continue your regular tender processing activities using Version 2.2.4.

Please review the implemented changes and share your feedback.

For any queries or support, feel free to reach out.

Thanks & Regards,

Dwip Pandya

releases.name: Tender 360 Final Release
releases.notes:
Hi Team,
We are pleased to inform you that the latest Tender360 Version 2.4.3 has been deployed and is now available for use.
The following functionalities, enhancements, and fixes have been implemented and are ready for usage.
________________________________________
Completed Features & Enhancements
External Tender Sharing
Admin users can now generate secure external shareable links for tenders.
Multiple active links can be created for the same tender.
Individual links can be revoked without affecting other active links.
Shared tenders can be viewed through secure read-only access.
Manual Document Upload
Added functionality to upload additional documents directly from the Tender Details → Documents tab.
Users can upload, view, and download multiple tender-specific documents.
Pagination State Retention
Users now return to the same listing page and position when navigating back from Tender Details.
Tender Details Editing
Authorized users can manually update tender details such as bidding start dates and other configurable fields.
Interactive Monitoring Dashboard
Tender Monitoring statistics cards are now dynamic.
Clicking a statistics card automatically filters the tender listing based on the selected category.
Notification Management
Added Clear Notifications functionality.
Users can clear all notifications from the notification panel.
Notifications are managed independently for each user.
Tender Notification Navigation
Tender-related notifications are now clickable.
Users are redirected directly to the respective Tender Details page.
Submission Date Change Notifications
Users now receive notifications whenever the submission date of a forwarded tender is updated.
Tender Value Filtering
Implemented filtering logic to display only tenders with values equal to or greater than ₹40 Lakhs.
Minor Fixes & Improvements
Various UI, usability, and performance improvements have been implemented.
________________________________________
Released for Monitoring
The following enhancements have been deployed and released for monitoring purposes. Since tender scraping scripts are currently not running in the QA environment, initial sanity validation has been completed by QA, and ongoing monitoring will continue in production.
AOC & Winner Details Scraping
Scraping and storage of Award of Contract (AOC) information.
Capture of Winner/Awarded Vendor details where available.
Display of AOC and winner information within Tender Details.
Corrigendum Document Visibility
Corrigendum documents are now displayed within Tender Details → Documents tab.
Download functionality supported for all applicable tender types.
Consolidated Corrigendum Email Notifications
Multiple corrigendum updates are consolidated into a single email.
Improved readability and reduced email volume.
Tender Update Email Redirection
Tender update emails now redirect users to the corresponding tender within Tender360 instead of the external portal.
Supports automatic post-login redirection to the respective tender.
Dynamic AI Analysis Prompt Configuration
Added Admin Settings functionality to configure AI Analysis prompts dynamically.
AI Analysis now uses both the system prompt and admin-configured prompt.
Prompt updates take effect immediately without deployment.
________________________________________
Current Version
Version: 2.4.3
________________________________________
Note
• The latest version is now available and stable for usage.
• You may continue your regular tender monitoring, analysis, and processing activities using Version 2.4.3.
• The monitoring items listed above will remain under observation to validate scraping behavior and data consistency across newly discovered tenders.
• For the functionalities released in this version, if you encounter any issues, unexpected behavior, or observe any functionality not working as per the discussed requirements, kindly let us know so that we can review and address it promptly.
________________________________________
QA Status
• All completed functionalities have been validated successfully by QA.
• Monitoring items have undergone initial sanity validation.
• No critical or blocking issues were identified during validation.
________________________________________
Please review the implemented changes and share your feedback.
For any queries or support, feel free to reach out.
Thanks & Regards,
Dwip Pandya

releases.name: CIMTrack Sprint 3 - iOS
releases.notes:
• Enhanced attendance system with Punch In/Out visibility on Home Screen, integrated API updates, and restriction of Punch Out within 5 minutes of Punch In
• Improved daily activity flow by auto-skipping the activity popup if activity is already submitted for the day
• Strengthened security with mandatory password change for default credentials, OTP-based Forgot Password, and enhanced password rules
• Added Geo-Tagged Image Capture with latitude, longitude, timestamp metadata and option to share captured images
• Implemented system event logging for app termination, GPS/location permission changes, and background location status
• Improved sync experience with network connectivity and signal strength visibility, plus iOS log file fixes
• Optimized background location tracking using activity recognition for better battery efficiency and idle-state handling

releases.name: Parvati Release
releases.notes:
We have released the latest firmware version, LRTU3100_v1.0.15, for QA/UAT validation. The firmware package is available on SharePoint under 3100_1.0.15.

This release introduces several enhancements and new features. The LCD interface has been updated to display PT status with clear labels, including Main PT, PT1, and PT2, enabling easier identification and monitoring of PT connections directly from the device display.

In addition, we have introduced the first version (1.0.0) of the Android and iOS mobile applications. These applications provide mobile access to core Parvati functionalities, including real-time RTU/Gateway monitoring, device parameter management, reporting, PT monitoring, and schedule configuration. Device communication workflows have also been enhanced with support for real-time synchronization, manual data fetching, PT data retrieval, and automated valve scheduling. Furthermore, reporting capabilities, data export functions, and monitoring dashboards have been optimized to improve operational visibility and accessibility for field users.

The Android and iOS applications have been submitted to the Google Play Store and Apple App Store and are currently under review. Subject to the respective platform approval timelines, the applications are expected to be available during the upcoming week. Download links will be shared once the publication process is completed.
